mapper.select: select log_id, pause_id, tenant_id, menu_id, action, oper_by, oper_time, remark from scm_tenant_menu_pause_log where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by oper_time desc

select l.log_id as logId, l.pause_id as pauseId, l.tenant_id as tenantId, l.menu_id as menuId, m.menu_name as menuName, l.action as action, l.oper_by as operBy, l.oper_time as operTime, l.remark as remark from scm_tenant_menu_pause_log l left join sys_menu m on m.menu_id = l.menu_id where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by l.oper_time desc
select log_id, pause_id, tenant_id, menu_id, action, oper_by, oper_time, remark from scm_tenant_menu_pause_log where pause_id = #{pauseId} order by oper_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into scm_tenant_menu_pause_log (log_id, pause_id, tenant_id, menu_id, action, oper_by, oper_time, remark) values (#{logId}, #{pauseId}, #{tenantId}, #{menuId}, #{action}, #{operBy}, #{operTime}, #{remark})
